responsibilities: Design and implement motion planning algorithms such as A*, RRT, and trajectory optimization for safe robot navigation
Develop collision-free path planning solutions that account for dynamic obstacles, kinematic constraints, and environmental geometry
Build trajectory optimization pipelines that generate smooth, dynamically feasible paths for robotic arms or mobile platforms
Implement and tune sampling-based and search-based planners to balance computation time against solution quality and optimality
Integrate motion planning modules with perception and control systems to ensure consistent end-to-end autonomous navigation behavior
Simulate and stress-test planning algorithms across diverse scenarios to validate robustness in cluttered and dynamic environments
Collaborate with controls engineers to ensure generated trajectories are executable within actuator and dynamic system limits
Profile and optimize planning algorithm runtime performance to meet real-time computational constraints on embedded hardware
Analyze planning failures and edge cases using simulation logs to iteratively improve algorithm robustness and coverage
